allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('testes.html','utf8'\);const qMatch=html.match\(/const questions = \(\\[[\\s\\S]*?\\]\);/\);const tMatch=html.match\(/const temperaments = \(\\{[\\s\\S]*?\\}\);/\);if\(qMatch&&tMatch\){const q=eval\(qMatch[1]\);const t=eval\(tMatch[1]\);console.log\('Q:'\);console.log\(Buffer.from\(JSON.stringify\(q\)\).toString\('base64'\)\);console.log\('T:'\);console.log\(Buffer.from\(JSON.stringify\(t\)\).toString\('base64'\)\);}")
